case_title: CALIFORNIA THERMAL WINDOWS VS CLARK, EDNA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,330.00 FILED BY CALIFORNIA THERMAL WINDOWS AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, EDNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, EDNA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA THERMAL WINDOWS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLARK, EDNA $1,330.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,330.00, PLAINTIFF WAIVED COSTS OF SUIT. DEFENDANT STIPULATE TO THE JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
